case_title: BANNON ALEXANDER VS DOBRIN JON MARC et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $878.25 FILED BY BANNON ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT DOBRIN JON MARC RAITT AND DOBRIN A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-24-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-24-1991, ADMINISTRATIVE CONTINUANCE TO JUL-12-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-12-1991, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-29-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANNON ALEXANDER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DOBRIN JON MARC RAITT AND DOBRIN A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION PLTF FAILED TO SUSTAIN THE BURDEN OF PROOF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
OBJECTION & RESPONSE TO PLAINTIFF'S POST TRIAL BRIEF & DECLARATION OF ANTONIO CELAYA FILED.
